detail: u,d,s anchors imported from charged-fermion APF_TRACE spectrum.
PDG light-quark masses are current-quark MSbar masses normalized at mu=2 GeV.
All three direct APF_TRACE -> MSbar(2 GeV) residuals exceed quoted 90%-CL uncertainty scales by large factors.
u,d,s are not quoted at self-scale; low-energy current masses use conventional 2 GeV normalization.
Confinement and renormalon/chiral physics make light-quark pole-mass export inadmissible.
Constituent/hadronic masses are dynamical hadron-scale quantities, not APF_TRACE current-mass codomain values.
s/d is near but outside PDG reported range; u/d and s/mhat fail strongly; no ratio-route closure.
PDG values used only as comparison targets, not as computational inputs.
Low-energy QCD/chiral/lattice transport theorem required before physical export.
